summary: Treat the work as a move-plus-transition project rather than a simple move.
reason: The sale, overlap timing, renovation decisions, and occupancy readiness were interdependent.

summary: Split mover work from self-move work.
reason: Different items, timing windows, and readiness constraints required different handling.

summary: Separate must-do-before-move work from deferred work.
reason: Some room readiness tasks affected move viability while others could wait.

summary: Use lightweight project artifacts instead of heavyweight formal PM packs.
reason: The project needed control and traceability, but not administrative overload.

summary: Treat trial-and-error and research as requirement discovery and scope validation.
reason: Some needs only became clear after options and constraints were tested against reality.
